action_set_definitions.name: get_workspace_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the content of specific annotations or matrices within the workspace, including the current list of paper IDs and metrics.

matrix_name.description: The key or name of the synthesis matrix to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: get_paper_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches detailed metadata for a paper, including DOI, publication status (e.g., Preprint vs Version of Record), and source type.

paper_id.description: The unique identifier of the paper.

action_set_definitions.name: get_paper_relationships
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the citation graph and internal cache to identify connections between papers, such as identifying if a paper is a derivative, a newer version, or shares a dataset with another paper.

paper_id.description: The unique identifier of the paper to check for relationships.

action_set_definitions.name: search_official_records
action_set_definitions.description: Searches external databases to verify the current status of a paper and locate the most authoritative version (Version of Record).

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_aacods_score
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a quality appraisal of a source based on AACODS standards (Authority, Accuracy, Coverage, Objectivity, Date, Significance).

action_set_definitions.name: update_workspace_matrix
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the synthesis matrix by updating the evidence list and the Grey_Yield_Ratio metric.

state_description.library: A list of paper objects currently saved in the user's reference manager.
state_description.search_history: A log of strings representing the search queries executed in the current session.
state_description.current_open_paper: The unique ID or title of the paper currently being viewed or analyzed.
state_description.workspace_annotations: A mapping of paper IDs to specific notes, highlights, or summaries created by the agent.
state_description.citation_graph_cache: Internal cache of related papers found through citation trailing to ensure consistency when navigating references.

library.title: Observational Study of Nirmatrelvir in Long COVID Patients
library.author: Miller et al.

library.title: Global Health Initiative: Antiviral Interventions for PASC
library.author: GHI Research Group

PRE_2023_MILLER.vor_title: Effectiveness of Nirmatrelvir for Post-Acute Sequelae of SARS-CoV-2: A Peer-Reviewed Analysis
